name: Dijon Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken breast halves, skinned and boned
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a skillet; cook chicken for about 20 minutes, or until tender. Remove from pan.
2. Drain VEG-ALL and add liquid to the pan juices with chicken broth.
3. Combine light cream and flour; add to the liquid in the pan. Cook and stir until thickened; stir in mustard.
4. Heat vegetables and cooked noodles in a little of the sauce.
5. Heat chicken in the remaining sauce and serve over vegetable mixture.
